prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Iron Kingdoms / Full Metal Fantasy inspired steampunk military-fantasy atlas for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent like western Immoren, surrounded by iron-grey seas, mechanikal factory-cities, steam-vented ruins, blighted marshes, warjack assembly ports, arcane storm fronts, rival nation borders, river city trade hubs, alchemist roads, coal basins, fortified rail lines and warcaster battlefields.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated Iron Kingdoms continent map, steampunk fantasy aesthetic, aged parchment with brass-and-iron mechanikal detail overlay, steam and magic intertwined, warjack smoke plumes, arcane lightning, industrial military fantasy tone.
Composition/framing: tall portrait atlas view, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding seas and offshore industrial platforms; include brass compass rose, riveted border, rail lines, factory icons, fortress markers, arcane storm symbols and national border shading without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, fjords, capes, deltas, smoky estuaries and varied landforms; include snowbound Khador-like northlands, temperate river kingdoms, blighted swamps, mountain holds, industrial basins, forests, coast harbors and arcane-scorched wastelands.
Avoid: clean heroic fantasy, modern satellite image, simple oval continent, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
